Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(assets\): migrate to WebP format and add new visual assets

- Convert icons from PNG to WebP for better compression
- Convert personas from PNG to WebP
- Add background images for all sections \(hero, programs, features, etc.\)
- Add product images \(seedling kits, curriculum cards, merchandise\)
- Add partner logos \(env ministry, KKL-JNF, nature parks authority\)
- Add social media post templates
- Add decorative vine elements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
